lean_statement:
theorem monotoneConvergence_integral {f : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞} (hf : ∀ n, AEMeasurable (f n) μ)
    (h_mono : ∀ n, f n ≤ᵐ[μ] f (n + 1)) :
    (∫⁻ ω, ⨆ n, f n ω ∂μ) = ⨆ n, (∫⁻ ω, f n ω ∂μ)
lean_proof:
by
  refine lintegral_iSup ?_ ?_
  · intro n; exact hf n
  · intro n
    filter_upwards [h_mono n] with ω hω
    exact hω
lean_declaration:
theorem monotoneConvergence_integral {f : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞} (hf : ∀ n, AEMeasurable (f n) μ)
    (h_mono : ∀ n, f n ≤ᵐ[μ] f (n + 1)) :
    (∫⁻ ω, ⨆ n, f n ω ∂μ) = ⨆ n, (∫⁻ ω, f n ω ∂μ) := by
  refine lintegral_iSup ?_ ?_
  · intro n; exact hf n
  · intro n
    filter_upwards [h_mono n] with ω hω
    exact hω
proof_strategy: original manual proof: one-sided inequality of MCT via iSup_le and lintegral_mono

lean_proof:
by
  rw [eq_comm]
  refine lintegral_iSup ?_ ?_
  · intro m; exact h_meas m
  · intro m
    filter_upwards [h_nondec m] with ω hω
    exact hω
lean_declaration:
theorem integral_iSup_monotone {g : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞}
    (h_meas : ∀ m, AEMeasurable (g m) μ) (h_nondec : ∀ m, g m ≤ᵐ[μ] g (m + 1)) :
    (⨆ m, (∫⁻ ω, g m ω ∂μ)) = (∫⁻ ω, ⨆ m, g m ω ∂μ) := by
  rw [eq_comm]
  refine lintegral_iSup ?_ ?_
  · intro m; exact h_meas m
  · intro m
    filter_upwards [h_nondec m] with ω hω
    exact hω
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_001

lean_proof:
by
  refine iSup_le ?_
  intro n
  refine lintegral_mono ?_
  intro ω
  exact le_iSup (fun k => f k ω) n
lean_declaration:
lemma lintegral_iSup_le_of_ae_monotone {f : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞}
    (hf : ∀ n, AEMeasurable (f n) μ) (h_mono : ∀ n, f n ≤ᵐ[μ] f (n + 1)) :
    (⨆ n, (∫⁻ ω, f n ω ∂μ)) ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ⨆ n, f n ω ∂μ) := by
  refine iSup_le ?_
  intro n
  refine lintegral_mono ?_
  intro ω
  exact le_iSup (fun k => f k ω) n
proof_strategy: one-sided inequality of MCT via iSup_le and lintegral_mono

lean_statement:
lemma markov_inequality {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : AEMeasurable X μ) (h_nonneg : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] X) (a : ℝ)
    (ha : 0 < a) : μ {ω | a ≤ X ω} ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (X ω) ∂μ) / ENNReal.ofReal a
lean_proof:
by
  have h_ind : {ω | a ≤ X ω} = {ω | ENNReal.ofReal a ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (X ω)} := by
    ext ω; simp [ha.le, ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal]
  rw [h_ind]
  refine measure_le_lintegral_indicator ?_ ?_
  · exact measurableSet_le measurable_const (hX.ennreal_ofReal)
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_pos.mpr ha |>.ne.symm
lean_declaration:
lemma markov_inequality {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : AEMeasurable X μ) (h_nonneg : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] X) (a : ℝ)
    (ha : 0 < a) : μ {ω | a ≤ X ω} ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (X ω) ∂μ) / ENNReal.ofReal a := by
  have h_ind : {ω | a ≤ X ω} = {ω | ENNReal.ofReal a ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (X ω)} := by
    ext ω; simp [ha.le, ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal]
  rw [h_ind]
  refine measure_le_lintegral_indicator ?_ ?_
  · exact measurableSet_le measurable_const (hX.ennreal_ofReal)
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_pos.mpr ha |>.ne.symm
proof_strategy: original manual proof: Chebyshev via Markov with squared deviation; uses variance definition

lean_statement:
lemma prob_ge_threshold_bound {Y : Ω → ℝ} (h_meas : AEMeasurable Y μ)
    (h_nonneg_Y : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] Y) {c : ℝ} (hc_pos : 0 < c) :
    (ENNReal.ofReal c) * μ {ω | c ≤ Y ω} ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (Y ω) ∂μ)
lean_proof:
by
  have h_ind : {ω | c ≤ Y ω} = {ω | ENNReal.ofReal c ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (Y ω)} := by
    ext ω; simp [hc_pos.le, ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal]
  rw [h_ind]
  refine mul_measure_le_lintegral ?_ ?_
  · exact measurableSet_le measurable_const (h_meas.ennreal_ofReal)
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_pos.mpr hc_pos |>.ne.symm
lean_declaration:
lemma prob_ge_threshold_bound {Y : Ω → ℝ} (h_meas : AEMeasurable Y μ)
    (h_nonneg_Y : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] Y) {c : ℝ} (hc_pos : 0 < c) :
    (ENNReal.ofReal c) * μ {ω | c ≤ Y ω} ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (Y ω) ∂μ) := by
  have h_ind : {ω | c ≤ Y ω} = {ω | ENNReal.ofReal c ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (Y ω)} := by
    ext ω; simp [hc_pos.le, ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal]
  rw [h_ind]
  refine mul_measure_le_lintegral ?_ ?_
  · exact measurableSet_le measurable_const (h_meas.ennreal_ofReal)
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_pos.mpr hc_pos |>.ne.symm
transformation: alpha_rename(X↦Y, a↦c), inequality_rearrangement (multiply both sides by ENNReal.ofReal c)
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_002

lean_statement:
lemma chebyshev_inequality {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : AEMeasurable X μ) (h_int : Integrable X μ) (ε : ℝ)
    (hε : 0 < ε) : μ {ω | ε ≤ |X ω - μ[X]|} ≤ Var[X; μ] / ε ^ 2
lean_proof:
by
  have h_nonneg_sq : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] (fun ω => (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) := by
    filter_upwards with ω; apply pow_two_nonneg
  have h_meas_sq : AEMeasurable (fun ω => (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) μ :=
    (hX.sub measurable_const).pow 2
  calc
    μ {ω | ε ≤ |X ω - μ[X]|} = μ {ω | ε ^ 2 ≤ (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2} := by
      apply measure_congr; intro ω; simp [abs_le_abs, hε.le]; exact?
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal ((X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) ∂μ) / ENNReal.ofReal (ε ^ 2) :=
      markov_inequality h_meas_sq h_nonneg_sq (ε ^ 2) (pow_pos hε 2)
    _ = Var[X; μ] / ε ^ 2 := by simp [Variance, ENNReal.ofReal_div]
lean_declaration:
lemma chebyshev_inequality {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : AEMeasurable X μ) (h_int : Integrable X μ) (ε : ℝ)
    (hε : 0 < ε) : μ {ω | ε ≤ |X ω - μ[X]|} ≤ Var[X; μ] / ε ^ 2 := by
  have h_nonneg_sq : 0 ≤ᵐ[μ] (fun ω => (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) := by
    filter_upwards with ω; apply pow_two_nonneg
  have h_meas_sq : AEMeasurable (fun ω => (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) μ :=
    (hX.sub measurable_const).pow 2
  calc
    μ {ω | ε ≤ |X ω - μ[X]|} = μ {ω | ε ^ 2 ≤ (X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2} := by
      apply measure_congr; intro ω; simp [abs_le_abs, hε.le]; exact?
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal ((X ω - μ[X]) ^ 2) ∂μ) / ENNReal.ofReal (ε ^ 2) :=
      markov_inequality h_meas_sq h_nonneg_sq (ε ^ 2) (pow_pos hε 2)
    _ = Var[X; μ] / ε ^ 2 := by simp [Variance, ENNReal.ofReal_div]
proof_strategy: Chebyshev via Markov with squared deviation; uses variance definition

lean_statement:
theorem weakLawLargeNumbers_iid {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_iid : ∀ n, IdentDistrib (X n) (X 0) μ μ)
    (h_sq_int : Integrable (fun ω => (X 0 ω) ^ 2) μ) (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    μ {ω | ε ≤ |(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i ω) / (n : ℝ) - μ[X 0]|} ≤
      Var[X 0; μ] / ((n : ℝ) * ε ^ 2)
lean_proof:
by
  have h_exp : μ[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ)] = μ[X 0] := by
    calc
      μ[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ)] = (∑ i in Finset.range n, μ[X i]) / (n : ℝ) := by
        rw [integral_div, integral_finset_sum]
      _ = (n * μ[X 0]) / (n : ℝ) := by
        simp [h_iid, integral_identDistrib]
      _ = μ[X 0] := by field_simp [hn]
  have h_var : Var[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ); μ] = Var[X 0; μ] / n := by
    calc
      Var[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ); μ] = Var[∑ i in Finset.range n, X i; μ] / (n : ℝ) ^ 2 :=
        Variance.const_div _ _
      _ = (n * Var[X 0; μ]) / (n : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
        simp [h_iid, Variance.sum_identDistrib]
      _ = Var[X 0; μ] / n := by field_simp [hn]; ring
  rw [h_exp]
  refine chebyshev_inequality ?_ ?_ ε hε
  · refine (integrable_finset_sum _ ?_).div_const _
    intro i; exact h_sq_int.integrable_sq
  · exact h_sq_int
lean_declaration:
theorem weakLawLargeNumbers_iid {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_iid : ∀ n, IdentDistrib (X n) (X 0) μ μ)
    (h_sq_int : Integrable (fun ω => (X 0 ω) ^ 2) μ) (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    μ {ω | ε ≤ |(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i ω) / (n : ℝ) - μ[X 0]|} ≤
      Var[X 0; μ] / ((n : ℝ) * ε ^ 2) := by
  have h_exp : μ[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ)] = μ[X 0] := by
    calc
      μ[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ)] = (∑ i in Finset.range n, μ[X i]) / (n : ℝ) := by
        rw [integral_div, integral_finset_sum]
      _ = (n * μ[X 0]) / (n : ℝ) := by
        simp [h_iid, integral_identDistrib]
      _ = μ[X 0] := by field_simp [hn]
  have h_var : Var[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ); μ] = Var[X 0; μ] / n := by
    calc
      Var[(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i) / (n : ℝ); μ] = Var[∑ i in Finset.range n, X i; μ] / (n : ℝ) ^ 2 :=
        Variance.const_div _ _
      _ = (n * Var[X 0; μ]) / (n : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
        simp [h_iid, Variance.sum_identDistrib]
      _ = Var[X 0; μ] / n := by field_simp [hn]; ring
  rw [h_exp]
  refine chebyshev_inequality ?_ ?_ ε hε
  · refine (integrable_finset_sum _ ?_).div_const _
    intro i; exact h_sq_int.integrable_sq
  · exact h_sq_int
proof_strategy: original manual proof: convergence in probability to 0 via WLLN bound and squeeze theorem

lean_proof:
by
  have h := weakLawLargeNumbers_iid h_dist h_sq m hm
  rw [ge_iff_le]
  exact h
lean_declaration:
theorem weakLLN_renamed {Y : ℕ → Ω → ℝ}
    (h_dist : ∀ k, IdentDistrib (Y k) (Y 0) μ μ)
    (h_sq : Integrable (fun ω => (Y 0 ω) ^ 2) μ) {m : ℕ} (hm : m ≠ 0) :
    Var[Y 0; μ] / ((m : ℝ) * ε ^ 2) ≥ μ {ω | ε ≤ |(∑ k in Finset.range m, Y k ω) / (m : ℝ) - μ[Y 0]|} := by
  have h := weakLawLargeNumbers_iid h_dist h_sq m hm
  rw [ge_iff_le]
  exact h
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_003

lean_statement:
theorem sampleMean_converges_in_probability {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ}
    (h_iid : ∀ n, IdentDistrib (X n) (X 0) μ μ)
    (h_sq_int : Integrable (fun ω => (X 0 ω) ^ 2) μ)
    (hεpos : 0 < ε) : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => μ {ω | ε ≤ |(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i ω) / (n : ℝ) - μ[X 0]|})
    atTop (𝓝 0)
lean_proof:
by
  apply tendsto_of_tendsto_of_tendsto_of_le_of_le ?_ ?_ (fun n => ?_) (fun n => ?_)
  · exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have := tendsto_div_atTop_nhds_0 (Var[X 0; μ] : ℝ) (by positivity)
    refine this.comp ?_
    exact tendsto_atTop_add_const_right _ ?_
  · positivity
  · rcases eq_or_ne n 0 with (rfl | hn)
    · simp
    · exact weakLawLargeNumbers_iid h_iid h_sq_int n hn
lean_declaration:
theorem sampleMean_converges_in_probability {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ}
    (h_iid : ∀ n, IdentDistrib (X n) (X 0) μ μ)
    (h_sq_int : Integrable (fun ω => (X 0 ω) ^ 2) μ)
    (hεpos : 0 < ε) : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => μ {ω | ε ≤ |(∑ i in Finset.range n, X i ω) / (n : ℝ) - μ[X 0]|})
    atTop (𝓝 0) := by
  apply tendsto_of_tendsto_of_tendsto_of_le_of_le ?_ ?_ (fun n => ?_) (fun n => ?_)
  · exact tendsto_const_nhds
  · have := tendsto_div_atTop_nhds_0 (Var[X 0; μ] : ℝ) (by positivity)
    refine this.comp ?_
    exact tendsto_atTop_add_const_right _ ?_
  · positivity
  · rcases eq_or_ne n 0 with (rfl | hn)
    · simp
    · exact weakLawLargeNumbers_iid h_iid h_sq_int n hn
proof_strategy: convergence in probability to 0 via WLLN bound and squeeze theorem

lean_statement:
theorem bayes_theorem {A B : Set Ω} (hA : MeasurableSet A) (hB : MeasurableSet B)
    (hμA : μ A ≠ 0) (hμB : μ B ≠ 0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    μ[A|B] = μ[B|A] * μ A / μ B
lean_proof:
by
  rw [cond_apply hB, cond_apply hA, Set.inter_comm A B, mul_comm (μ B)⁻¹, ← mul_assoc,
    mul_comm (μ (A ∩ B)), mul_assoc, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hμA, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hμB, mul_one]
lean_declaration:
theorem bayes_theorem {A B : Set Ω} (hA : MeasurableSet A) (hB : MeasurableSet B)
    (hμA : μ A ≠ 0) (hμB : μ B ≠ 0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    μ[A|B] = μ[B|A] * μ A / μ B := by
  rw [cond_apply hB, cond_apply hA, Set.inter_comm A B, mul_comm (μ B)⁻¹, ← mul_assoc,
    mul_comm (μ (A ∩ B)), mul_assoc, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hμA, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hμB, mul_one]
proof_strategy: original manual proof: law of total probability via measure additivity on partition A, Aᶜ

lean_statement:
theorem bayes_renamed {S T : Set Ω} (hS_meas : MeasurableSet S) (hT_meas : MeasurableSet T)
    (hμS_ne : μ S ≠ 0) (hμT_ne : μ T ≠ 0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    (μ T)⁻¹ * μ[S|T] * μ S = μ[T|S]
lean_proof:
by
  rw [bayes_theorem hS_meas hT_meas hμS_ne hμT_ne]
  ring
lean_declaration:
theorem bayes_renamed {S T : Set Ω} (hS_meas : MeasurableSet S) (hT_meas : MeasurableSet T)
    (hμS_ne : μ S ≠ 0) (hμT_ne : μ T ≠ 0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    (μ T)⁻¹ * μ[S|T] * μ S = μ[T|S] := by
  rw [bayes_theorem hS_meas hT_meas hμS_ne hμT_ne]
  ring
transformation: alpha_rename(A↦S, B↦T), algebraic_rearrangement (isolate μ[T|S] on RHS)
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_004

lean_statement:
theorem law_of_total_probability {A : Set Ω} (hA : MeasurableSet A)
    (hAc : MeasurableSet (Aᶜ)) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {B : Set Ω} (hB : MeasurableSet B) :
    μ B = μ[B|A] * μ A + μ[B|Aᶜ] * μ (Aᶜ)
lean_proof:
by
  have h_union : A ∪ Aᶜ = Set.univ := Set.union_compl_self A
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint A (Aᶜ) := Set.disjoint_compl_right A
  calc
    μ B = μ (B ∩ Set.univ) := by simp
    _ = μ (B ∩ (A ∪ Aᶜ)) := by rw [h_union]
    _ = μ ((B ∩ A) ∪ (B ∩ Aᶜ)) := by rw [Set.inter_union_distrib_left]
    _ = μ (B ∩ A) + μ (B ∩ Aᶜ) := by
      refine measure_union ?_ (hB.inter hAc)
      exact h_disjoint.inter_left B
    _ = μ[B|A] * μ A + μ[B|Aᶜ] * μ (Aᶜ) := by
      rw [cond_apply hA, cond_apply hAc, mul_comm, mul_comm _ (μ (Aᶜ))]
lean_declaration:
theorem law_of_total_probability {A : Set Ω} (hA : MeasurableSet A)
    (hAc : MeasurableSet (Aᶜ)) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {B : Set Ω} (hB : MeasurableSet B) :
    μ B = μ[B|A] * μ A + μ[B|Aᶜ] * μ (Aᶜ) := by
  have h_union : A ∪ Aᶜ = Set.univ := Set.union_compl_self A
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint A (Aᶜ) := Set.disjoint_compl_right A
  calc
    μ B = μ (B ∩ Set.univ) := by simp
    _ = μ (B ∩ (A ∪ Aᶜ)) := by rw [h_union]
    _ = μ ((B ∩ A) ∪ (B ∩ Aᶜ)) := by rw [Set.inter_union_distrib_left]
    _ = μ (B ∩ A) + μ (B ∩ Aᶜ) := by
      refine measure_union ?_ (hB.inter hAc)
      exact h_disjoint.inter_left B
    _ = μ[B|A] * μ A + μ[B|Aᶜ] * μ (Aᶜ) := by
      rw [cond_apply hA, cond_apply hAc, mul_comm, mul_comm _ (μ (Aᶜ))]
proof_strategy: law of total probability via measure additivity on partition A, Aᶜ

lean_statement:
theorem borel_cantelli {A : ℕ → Set Ω} (hA : ∀ n, MeasurableSet (A n))
    (h_sum : ∑' n, μ (A n) ≠ ∞) : μ (limsup A atTop) = 0
lean_proof:
by
  have h_sum_lt : ∑' n, μ (A n) < ∞ := lt_of_le_of_ne ENNReal.le_top h_sum
  refine measure_limsup_eq_zero h_sum_lt ?_
  exact hA
lean_declaration:
theorem borel_cantelli {A : ℕ → Set Ω} (hA : ∀ n, MeasurableSet (A n))
    (h_sum : ∑' n, μ (A n) ≠ ∞) : μ (limsup A atTop) = 0 := by
  have h_sum_lt : ∑' n, μ (A n) < ∞ := lt_of_le_of_ne ENNReal.le_top h_sum
  refine measure_limsup_eq_zero h_sum_lt ?_
  exact hA
proof_strategy: original manual proof: BC → almost surely only finitely many events occur

lean_statement:
theorem first_BC_renamed {E : ℕ → Set Ω} (h_meas : ∀ k, MeasurableSet (E k))
    (h_summable : ∑' k, μ (E k) < ∞) : 0 = μ (limsup E atTop)
lean_proof:
by
  rw [eq_comm]
  apply borel_cantelli h_meas
  exact ne_of_lt h_summable
lean_declaration:
theorem first_BC_renamed {E : ℕ → Set Ω} (h_meas : ∀ k, MeasurableSet (E k))
    (h_summable : ∑' k, μ (E k) < ∞) : 0 = μ (limsup E atTop) := by
  rw [eq_comm]
  apply borel_cantelli h_meas
  exact ne_of_lt h_summable
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_005

lean_statement:
theorem borel_cantelli_ae_finite {A : ℕ → Set Ω} (hA : ∀ n, MeasurableSet (A n))
    (h_sum : ∑' n, μ (A n) ≠ ∞) : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n
lean_proof:
by
  have h_zero := borel_cantelli hA h_sum
  have h_mem : {ω | ¬ ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n} = limsup A atTop := by
    ext ω; simp [limsup_eq_infi_supr, Filter.eventually_atTop]
  rw [ae_iff]
  calc
    μ {ω | ¬ ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n} = μ (limsup A atTop) := by rw [h_mem]
    _ = 0 := h_zero
lean_declaration:
theorem borel_cantelli_ae_finite {A : ℕ → Set Ω} (hA : ∀ n, MeasurableSet (A n))
    (h_sum : ∑' n, μ (A n) ≠ ∞) : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n := by
  have h_zero := borel_cantelli hA h_sum
  have h_mem : {ω | ¬ ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n} = limsup A atTop := by
    ext ω; simp [limsup_eq_infi_supr, Filter.eventually_atTop]
  rw [ae_iff]
  calc
    μ {ω | ¬ ∀ᶠ n in atTop, ω ∉ A n} = μ (limsup A atTop) := by rw [h_mem]
    _ = 0 := h_zero
proof_strategy: BC → almost surely only finitely many events occur

lean_statement:
theorem jensen {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) (hφ : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ φ)
    (hφ_meas : Measurable φ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    φ (μ[X]) ≤ μ[φ ∘ X]
lean_proof:
by
  have h_int_X : Integrable X μ := hX
  have h_int_φX : Integrable (φ ∘ X) μ := by
    refine hφ_meas.comp_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable |>.integrable ?_
    exact hX
  refine convexOn_univ_integral_le ?_ hφ h_int_X h_int_φX
  · intro x; exact trivial
lean_declaration:
theorem jensen {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) (hφ : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ φ)
    (hφ_meas : Measurable φ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    φ (μ[X]) ≤ μ[φ ∘ X] := by
  have h_int_X : Integrable X μ := hX
  have h_int_φX : Integrable (φ ∘ X) μ := by
    refine hφ_meas.comp_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable |>.integrable ?_
    exact hX
  refine convexOn_univ_integral_le ?_ hφ h_int_X h_int_φX
  · intro x; exact trivial
proof_strategy: original manual proof: conditional Jensen via ae_trim and conditional expectation properties

lean_proof:
by
  rw [ge_iff_le]
  apply jensen h_int_Y h_conv h_meas_ψ

theorem expectation_convex_function {Y : Ω → ℝ}
    (h_int_Y : Integrable Y μ) (h_conv : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ ψ) (h_meas_ψ : Measurable ψ)
    [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[ψ ∘ Y] ≥ ψ (μ[Y]) := by
  rw [ge_iff_le]
  apply jensen h_int_Y h_conv h_meas_ψ

theorem cond_jensen {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) (hφ : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ φ)
    (hφ_meas : Measurable φ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {m : MeasurableSpace Ω} (hm : m ≤ m0) :
    φ (μ[X|m]) ≤ᵐ[μ] μ[φ ∘ X|m]
lean_proof:
by
  refine ae_of_ae_trim hm ?_
  refine cond_exp_convex_le hX hφ hφ_meas ?_
  exact hX.integrable_on
lean_declaration:
theorem cond_jensen {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) (hφ : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ φ)
    (hφ_meas : Measurable φ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {m : MeasurableSpace Ω} (hm : m ≤ m0) :
    φ (μ[X|m]) ≤ᵐ[μ] μ[φ ∘ X|m] := by

  refine cond_exp_convex_le hX hφ hφ_meas ?_

lean_statement:
lemma indepFun_iff_product {X : Ω → α} {Y : Ω → β}
    (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    IndepFun X Y μ ↔ ∀ (s : Set α) (t : Set β), MeasurableSet s → MeasurableSet t →
      μ (X ⁻¹' s ∩ Y ⁻¹' t) = μ (X ⁻¹' s) * μ (Y ⁻¹' t)
lean_proof:
by
  rw [IndepFun_iff]
  refine ⟨fun h s t hs ht => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · exact h (MeasurableSet.inter (hX hs) (hY ht))
  · intro u hu
    refine indepSets_iff.mp ?_ _ _ ?_ ?_ hu
    · exact hX; · exact hY
    · exact h
lean_declaration:
lemma indepFun_iff_product {X : Ω → α} {Y : Ω → β}
    (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    IndepFun X Y μ ↔ ∀ (s : Set α) (t : Set β), MeasurableSet s → MeasurableSet t →
      μ (X ⁻¹' s ∩ Y ⁻¹' t) = μ (X ⁻¹' s) * μ (Y ⁻¹' t) := by
  rw [IndepFun_iff]
  refine ⟨fun h s t hs ht => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · exact h (MeasurableSet.inter (hX hs) (hY ht))
  · intro u hu
    refine indepSets_iff.mp ?_ _ _ ?_ ?_ hu
    · exact hX; · exact hY
    · exact h
proof_strategy: original manual proof: generalization from random variables to sigma-algebras

lean_statement:
lemma independence_product_rule {U : Ω → α} {V : Ω → β}
    (hU_meas : Measurable U) (hV_meas : Measurable V) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    IndepFun U V μ ↔ μ (U ⁻¹' s ∩ V ⁻¹' t) = μ (U ⁻¹' s) * μ (V ⁻¹' t) := by
  refine indepFun_iff_product hU_meas hV_meas
lean_proof:
by
  refine indepFun_iff_product hU_meas hV_meas
lean_declaration:
lemma independence_product_rule {U : Ω → α} {V : Ω → β}
    (hU_meas : Measurable U) (hV_meas : Measurable V) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    IndepFun U V μ ↔ μ (U ⁻¹' s ∩ V ⁻¹' t) = μ (U ⁻¹' s) * μ (V ⁻¹' t) := by
  refine indepFun_iff_product hU_meas hV_meas := by
  refine indepFun_iff_product hU_meas hV_meas
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_007

by
  rw [Indep_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h a ha b hb
    exact h a b ha hb
  · intro h a b ha hb
    exact h a ha b hb
lean_declaration:
lemma indep_sigma_algebras_product {A B : Set (Set Ω)}
    (hA : MeasurableSpace Ω) (hB : MeasurableSpace Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    Indep A B μ ↔ ∀ (a ∈ A) (b ∈ B), μ (a ∩ b) = μ a * μ b := by
  rw [Indep_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h a ha b hb
    exact h a b ha hb
  · intro h a b ha hb
    exact h a ha b hb
proof_strategy: generalization from random variables to sigma-algebras

    (hm : m ≤ m0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[μ[X|m]] = μ[X]
lean_proof:
by
  rw [integral_cond_exp hm]
  exact hX

theorem law_of_total_expectation {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) {m : MeasurableSpace Ω}
    (hm : m ≤ m0) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[μ[X|m]] = μ[X] := by

theorem tower_property {X : Ω → ℝ} (hX : Integrable X μ) {ℋ 𝒢 : MeasurableSpace Ω}
    (hℋ : ℋ ≤ m0) (h𝒢 : 𝒢 ≤ m0) (hℋ𝒢 : ℋ ≤ 𝒢) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    μ[μ[X|𝒢]|ℋ] =ᵐ[μ] μ[X|ℋ] := by
  refine ae_eq_of_subalgebra_of_subalgebra ?_ ?_ hℋ h𝒢 hℋ𝒢 hX
  exact hX.integrable_on

lemma martingale_expectation_const {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_mart : Martingale X ℱ μ)
    (n m : ℕ) (h_le : n ≤ m) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[X n] = μ[X m]
lean_proof:
by
  have h := martingale_expectation_eq h_mart n m h_le
  exact h
lean_declaration:
lemma martingale_expectation_const {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_mart : Martingale X ℱ μ)
    (n m : ℕ) (h_le : n ≤ m) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[X n] = μ[X m] := by
  have h := martingale_expectation_eq h_mart n m h_le
  exact h
proof_strategy: original manual proof: Doob decomposition: every adapted integrable process = martingale + predictable

    {i j : ℕ} (h_ij : i ≤ j) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : μ[Y j] = μ[Y i]

by
  rw [eq_comm]
  exact martingale_expectation_const h_mg i j h_ij
lean_declaration:
lemma mg_expectation_invariant {Y : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_mg : Martingale Y 𝒢 μ)

lean_statement:
theorem doob_decomposition {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_adapted : Adapted X ℱ)
    (h_int : ∀ n, Integrable (X n) μ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    ∃ (M : ℕ → Ω → ℝ) (A : ℕ → Ω → ℝ), Martingale M ℱ μ ∧ A 0 =ᵐ[μ] 0 ∧
      (∀ n, A n ≤ᵐ[μ] A (n + 1)) ∧ ∀ n, X n =ᵐ[μ] M n + A n
lean_proof:
by
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n; exact X n - ∑ k in Finset.range n, (μ[X (k+1)|ℱ k] - X k)
  · intro n; exact ∑ k in Finset.range n, (μ[X (k+1)|ℱ k] - X k)
  · -- M is a martingale
    refine martingale_sub h_adapted ?_
    exact predictable_sum h_adapted h_int
  · -- A starts at 0
    simp
  · -- A is increasing (predictable)
    intro n
    refine h_adapted.predictable ?_
    exact h_int
  · -- X = M + A
    intro n; simp [sub_add_cancel]
lean_declaration:
theorem doob_decomposition {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (h_adapted : Adapted X ℱ)
    (h_int : ∀ n, Integrable (X n) μ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] :
    ∃ (M : ℕ → Ω → ℝ) (A : ℕ → Ω → ℝ), Martingale M ℱ μ ∧ A 0 =ᵐ[μ] 0 ∧
      (∀ n, A n ≤ᵐ[μ] A (n + 1)) ∧ ∀ n, X n =ᵐ[μ] M n + A n := by
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n; exact X n - ∑ k in Finset.range n, (μ[X (k+1)|ℱ k] - X k)
  · intro n; exact ∑ k in Finset.range n, (μ[X (k+1)|ℱ k] - X k)
  · -- M is a martingale
    refine martingale_sub h_adapted ?_
    exact predictable_sum h_adapted h_int
  · -- A starts at 0
    simp
  · -- A is increasing (predictable)
    intro n
    refine h_adapted.predictable ?_
    exact h_int
  · -- X = M + A
    intro n; simp [sub_add_cancel]
proof_strategy: Doob decomposition: every adapted integrable process = martingale + predictable

lean_proof:
by
  refine identDistrib_of_cf_eq hX hY ?_
  intro t
  exact h_eq t
lean_declaration:
theorem characteristicFunction_uniqueness {X Y : Ω → ℝ}
    (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure ν]
    (h_eq : ∀ t : ℝ, cf X μ t = cf Y ν t) : IdentDistrib X Y μ ν := by
  refine identDistrib_of_cf_eq hX hY ?_
  intro t
  exact h_eq t
proof_strategy: original manual proof: Levy continuity theorem (simple case): pointwise cf convergence → weak convergen

lean_proof:
by
  apply characteristicFunction_uniqueness hU hV
  exact h_cf
lean_declaration:
theorem cf_determines_distribution {U V : Ω → ℝ}
    (hU : Measurable U) (hV : Measurable V) [IsProbabilityMeasure P] [IsProbabilityMeasure Q]
    (h_cf : ∀ s : ℝ, cf U P s = cf V Q s) : IdentDistrib U V P Q := by
  apply characteristicFunction_uniqueness hU hV
  exact h_cf
transformation: alpha_rename(X↦U, Y↦V, μ↦P, ν↦Q, t↦s), binder_reorder
proof_strategy: perturbation of prob_manual_L1_010

lean_statement:
theorem levy_continuity_simple {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (hX : ∀ n, Measurable (X n))
    (h_cf_cv : ∀ t : ℝ, Tendsto (fun n => cf (X n) μ t) atTop (𝓝 (cf X μ t)))
    [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : Tendsto (fun n => μ.map (X n)) atTop (𝓝 (μ.map X))
lean_proof:
by
  refine Filter.Tendsto.metric ?_
  intro ε hε
  have h := levy_continuity hX h_cf_cv
  rcases h (Metric.ball (μ.map X) ε) (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ hε) with ⟨N, hN⟩
  refine ⟨N, fun n hn => ?_⟩
  exact hN n hn
lean_declaration:
theorem levy_continuity_simple {X : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} (hX : ∀ n, Measurable (X n))
    (h_cf_cv : ∀ t : ℝ, Tendsto (fun n => cf (X n) μ t) atTop (𝓝 (cf X μ t)))
    [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] : Tendsto (fun n => μ.map (X n)) atTop (𝓝 (μ.map X)) := by
  refine Filter.Tendsto.metric ?_
  intro ε hε
  have h := levy_continuity hX h_cf_cv
  rcases h (Metric.ball (μ.map X) ε) (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ hε) with ⟨N, hN⟩
  refine ⟨N, fun n hn => ?_⟩
  exact hN n hn
proof_strategy: Levy continuity theorem (simple case): pointwise cf convergence → weak convergence
